package rulecoverage

func NegativePackageLevelMutableConfigUsedByHandlersServices() string {
    ruleID := "package_level_mutable_config_used_by_handlers_services"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Mutable package globals used as live config in request paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
